postReview.title: Vanney proud of LA Galaxy players after record winless start ends
postReview.description: The LA Galaxy beat Real Salt Lake 2-0 on Saturday to record their first league victory of the season after 17 attempts.

preReview.title: LA Galaxy v Real Salt Lake: 'The opposition aren't better than us' – Vanney
preReview.description: Defending MLS champions LA Galaxy host Real Salt Lake this weekend still searching for their first victory of the season after 16 attempts.
